Title: Successfully add new user with valid data
Preconditions: 1. Server is running on localhost:5000 | 2. Database is connected | 3. User navigates to /users page
Steps: 1. Enter valid name in Name field | 2. Select valid date of birth (18+ years old) | 3. Enter valid address (minimum 5 characters) | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Verify success message appears | 6. Check that user appears in table below form
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL 62701
Expected Result: 1. Success message "User added successfully!" displays | 2. Form fields are cleared after submission | 3. New user appears in the users list table with correct data | 4. Table shows Name, Date of Birth, Address, and Added On columns | 5. No validation errors shown

Title: Complete user journey from landing page to user management
Preconditions: 1. Application is running | 2. User starts on landing page
Steps: 1. Open application at root URL (/) | 2. Click "Users" link in navigation | 3. Verify navigation to /users route | 4. Fill out user form with valid data | 5. Submit form | 6. Verify user appears in table | 7. Click Back button | 8. Verify navigation returns to home page
Test Data: Valid user data: Name: Jane Smith | DOB: 1985-03-20 | Address: 456 Oak Avenue, Chicago, IL 60601
Expected Result: 1. Navigation works from all pages (/, /form, /kyc) to /users | 2. User form submission successful | 3. User data persists in database and displays in table | 4. Back button returns to home page | 5. All navigation links are functional

Title: Add user with minimum valid name length
Preconditions: Server is running and /users page is loaded
Steps: 1. Enter name with exactly 2 characters | 2. Enter valid DOB (18+) | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form | 5. Verify no validation errors
Test Data: Name: Jo | DOB: 1995-01-01 | Address: 789 Elm Street, Boston, MA 02108
Expected Result: 1. Form accepts 2-character name | 2. No validation error for name field | 3. User is created successfully | 4. User appears in table with 2-character name

Title: Add user with special characters in name (hyphen and apostrophe)
Preconditions: Server is running and /users page is loaded
Steps: 1. Enter name with hyphen: Mary-Jane | 2. Enter valid DOB | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form | 5. Verify user created | 6. Enter name with apostrophe: O'Brien | 7. Enter valid DOB | 8. Enter valid address | 9. Submit form | 10. Verify user created
Test Data: Name 1: Mary-Jane | Name 2: O'Brien | DOB: 1988-07-12 | Address: 321 Pine Street, Seattle, WA 98101
Expected Result: 1. Names with hyphens and apostrophes are accepted | 2. No validation errors | 3. Both users created successfully | 4. Special characters display correctly in table

Title: User exactly 18 years old (boundary test)
Preconditions: Server is running and /users page is loaded
Steps: 1. Calculate date exactly 18 years ago from today | 2. Enter valid name | 3. Select calculated DOB | 4. Enter valid address | 5. Submit form | 6. Verify user created
Test Data: Name: Alex Johnson | DOB: (today's date - 18 years) | Address: 111 Maple Drive, Austin, TX 78701
Expected Result: 1. Date of birth exactly 18 years ago is accepted | 2. No age validation error | 3. User created successfully

Title: Empty users table on initial load
Steps: 1. Navigate to /users page | 2. Observe users table section | 3. Verify empty state message
Test Data: No test data required
Expected Result: 1. Table shows empty state message: "No users found. Add your first user above." | 2. Table structure is visible with headers (Name, Date of Birth, Address, Added On) | 3. No errors in console

Title: Form shows progress bar as fields are filled
Steps: 1. Observe progress bar at 0% (empty form) | 2. Fill Name field | 3. Check progress bar updates | 4. Fill DOB field | 5. Check progress bar updates | 6. Fill Address field | 7. Verify progress bar shows 100%
Test Data: Name: Test User | DOB: 1990-01-01 | Address: 123 Test Street
Expected Result: 1. Progress bar starts at 0% | 2. Progress increases as each field is filled (33% per field) | 3. Progress reaches 100% when all fields filled | 4. Progress bar visual feedback is clear

Title: Multiple users display correctly in table
Steps: 1. Navigate to /users page | 2. Verify users table loads | 3. Check all columns display data | 4. Verify date formatting | 5. Hover over table rows
Test Data: At least 3 users in database with varied data
Expected Result: 1. All users display in table rows | 2. Dates formatted as "MMM DD, YYYY" (e.g., Jan 15, 2024) | 3. All columns (Name, DOB, Address, Added On) show correct data | 4. Row hover effect changes background color | 5. Table is scrollable if many users

Title: Submit form with empty name field
Steps: 1. Leave Name field empty | 2. Fill valid DOB | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: (empty) | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message displays: "Name is required" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. Name field shows red border (input-error class) | 4. Error appears below Name field | 5. Other fields retain entered values

Title: Submit form with 1-character name
Steps: 1. Enter single character in Name field | 2. Fill valid DOB | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: A | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message displays: "Name must be at least 2 characters" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. Name field shows red border | 4. Error appears below Name field

Title: Submit form with invalid characters in name
Steps: 1. Enter name with numbers: John123 | 2. Fill valid DOB | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Attempt to submit | 5. Verify validation error | 6. Try special chars: John@Doe | 7. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John123 (then John@Doe) | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes" | 2. Form not submitted for both test cases | 3. Name field shows validation error | 4. Invalid characters are highlighted

Title: Submit form with empty date of birth
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Leave DOB field empty | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: (empty) | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message displays: "Date of birth is required" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. DOB field shows red border | 4. Error appears below DOB field

Title: Submit form with future date of birth
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Select future date in DOB field | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 2030-01-01 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "Date of birth must be in the past" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. DOB field shows validation error

Title: Submit form with DOB for user under 18 years old
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Select date less than 18 years ago | 3. Fill valid address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: (today's date - 10 years) | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "You must be at least 18 years old" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. DOB field shows validation error | 4. Age requirement clearly communicated

Title: Submit form with empty address
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Fill valid DOB | 3. Leave Address field empty | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: (empty)
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "Address is required" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. Address field shows red border | 4. Error appears below Address field

Title: Submit form with address less than 5 characters
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Fill valid DOB | 3. Enter 3-character address | 4. Click Add User button | 5. Verify validation error
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "Please enter a valid address" | 2. Form is not submitted | 3. Address field shows validation error | 4. Minimum length requirement enforced

Title: Server unavailable during form submission
Preconditions: 1. Server is stopped or unreachable | 2. User is on /users page
Steps: 1. Fill form with valid data | 2. Click Add User button | 3. Verify error handling | 4. Check that form data is not lost
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message displays: "An error occurred while adding the user. Please ensure the server is running." | 2. Form data remains in fields (not cleared) | 3. User can retry after server is back | 4. Loading state ends after error

Title: Database connection failure
Preconditions: 1. Server running but database disconnected | 2. User is on /users page
Steps: 1. Fill form with valid data | 2. Submit form | 3. Verify error from server | 4. Check error message displayed
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Error message displayed to user | 2. Form not cleared | 3. Error logged to console | 4. User notified to try again later

Steps: 1. Locate Users button in top right | 2. Click Users button | 3. Verify navigation to /users

Title: Back button returns to home page
Steps: 1. Click Back button (top left) | 2. Verify navigation to root (/) | 3. Verify landing page loads
Test Data: No specific test data
Expected Result: 1. Back button visible and styled correctly | 2. Click navigates to home page | 3. Landing page loads without errors

Title: Form validation updates in real-time as user types
Steps: 1. Start typing invalid name (e.g., "A") | 2. Observe error message appears | 3. Continue typing to make valid (e.g., "Ab") | 4. Observe error clears | 5. Repeat for other fields
Test Data: Progressive input: A → Ab → ABC | DOB and Address fields
Expected Result: 1. Validation errors appear immediately for invalid input | 2. Errors clear when input becomes valid | 3. Real-time feedback does not cause lag | 4. User experience is smooth

Title: Success message auto-dismisses after 3 seconds
Preconditions: User is on /users page with valid form data
Steps: 1. Fill form with valid data | 2. Submit form | 3. Observe success message | 4. Wait 3 seconds | 5. Verify message disappears
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Main Street
Expected Result: 1. Success message appears after submission | 2. Message displays "User added successfully!" | 3. Message auto-dismisses after 3 seconds | 4. Form remains usable after dismissal

Title: Date formatting in table displays correctly
Preconditions: Database has users with various dates
Steps: 1. Navigate to /users page | 2. Observe date formats in DOB column | 3. Observe date formats in Added On column
Expected Result: 1. Dates display as "MMM DD, YYYY" format (e.g., May 15, 1990) | 2. All dates consistently formatted | 3. Dates are readable and clear | 4. No raw ISO date strings visible

Title: Brand compliance check - Oktawave colors and typography
Steps: 1. Inspect navigation button colors | 2. Check table styling | 3. Verify button colors | 4. Check font family | 5. Verify primary color usage
Test Data: No specific test data
Expected Result: 1. Primary colors (#2DB5DA or #6366f1) used for interactive elements | 2. Font family is Proxima Nova with Montserrat fallback | 3. Color scheme consistent with Oktawave guidelines | 4. Visual hierarchy follows brand standards

Title: Submit completely empty form
Preconditions: User is on /users page with empty form
Steps: 1. Click Add User button without filling any fields | 2. Verify validation errors for all fields
Test Data: All fields empty
Expected Result: 1. Three validation errors display (Name, DOB, Address) | 2. All fields show red borders | 3. First error message shown at top | 4. Form not submitted | 5. User can correct and resubmit

Title: Loading state during user list fetch
Preconditions: 1. Database has users | 2. Slow network simulated or fresh page load
Steps: 1. Navigate to /users page | 2. Observe loading state while users fetch | 3. Verify loading message | 4. Wait for users to load
Test Data: Database with 5+ users
Expected Result: 1. Loading message "Loading users..." displays while fetching | 2. Table structure visible during load | 3. Users populate table after fetch completes | 4. No errors during load

Title: Long address text in table
Preconditions: User adds entry with very long address
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Enter valid DOB | 3. Enter very long address (200+ characters) | 4. Submit form | 5. Check table display
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-05-15 | Address: 123 Very Long Street Name In A Very Long City With A Very Long State And Province And Additional Location Details That Extend Beyond Normal Length Requirements To Test Table Display And Wrapping Behavior In The User Interface
Expected Result: 1. Long address displays without breaking table layout | 2. Address text wraps within cell or truncates appropriately | 3. Table remains horizontally scrollable if needed | 4. No overlap with other columns

Title: Multiple rapid form submissions handled correctly
Steps: 1. Fill valid form data | 2. Click Add User rapidly 3 times | 3. Observe behavior | 4. Check users table
Test Data: Name: Test User | DOB: 1990-01-01 | Address: 123 Test St
Expected Result: 1. Button disables after first click (prevents double submission) | 2. Only one user created | 3. Loading state shown during submission | 4. Form re-enables after completion
